claim_boundary: This is an exact equatorial geometry and conditional boundary/localization reduction. It does not identify observed spacetime, physical gauge groups or charges, a physical fermion equation, magnetic monopoles, measured couplings, an absolute unit, or full BHSM.
normal_component: an adjoint scalar candidate subject to gauge constraints and parity
normalization: inherits the declared Sp1 subgroup convention only after the same boundary profile is sourced
surviving_data: boundary holonomy where a loop and domain are specified
zero_mode: no additional independent smooth M4 vector zero mode
